name: second-brain
description: All brain2 vault interactions in one plugin. LLM-maintained knowledge wiki for your Obsidian vault. Skills: second-brain (mega: ingest/query/lint/note/brain-dump/kanban), memory-recall (read-only access to wiki/code-knowledge/), project-memory-recall (role-partitioned per-project memory query). Active store skills retired in favor of observation-driven pipeline: every Claude turn is auto-logged to workspace `observation.md` by the Stop hook (auto-creates if missing); a nightly dream skill (2 AM, planned) reads observation.md and extracts insights into wiki/projects/<X>/memory/<role>.md, then archives the day's log. 3 hooks: SessionStart inject (wiki sections banner), UserPromptSubmit reminder (recall pointer), Stop observation_logger. Vault path configurable via SECOND_BRAIN_VAULT env var.
